title: arachne orbicularis
intro: Arachne orbicularis, also known as the 'Doll's Eyes' plant, is a perennial species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides in its roots. The health benefits of Arachne orbicularis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Arachne orbicularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
